mapper.select: SELECT b.id, '2' type FROM sys_eve_user_custom_menubox b WHERE b.id = #{id} UNION SELECT c.id, '3' type FROM sys_eve_user_custom_menu c WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, '1' menuType#系统菜单，禁止修改 FROM sys_eve_menu a WHERE a.id = #{id} UNION SELECT b.id, '2' menuType#用户自定义快捷方式，可以修改 FROM sys_eve_user_custom_menu b WHERE b.id = #{id} UNION SELECT c.id, '3' menuType#用户自定义菜单盒子，可以修改 FROM sys_eve_user_custom_menubox c WHERE c.id = #{id}
